name: Update Hunter Express Shipping Zones
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow these steps if you are using current rates and need to update the shipping zones for them."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Requirements"}], "data-id": "requirements"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To complete these steps you will need:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The most recent shipping zones CSV file, supplied by Hunter Express."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Neto's "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.neto.com.au/assets/downloads/templates/import_shipping_zones.csv", "children": [{"text": "shipping zone template"}]}, {"text": ", so the Hunter Express zones can be transposed and imported."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Prepare your Zone File for Import"}], "data-id": "prepare-your-zone-file-for-import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The data in the Hunter Express zone file needs to be copied into the Neto template so that it can be imported:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the Hunter Express zone file, and the Neto zone template file. Add a column heading called "}, {"text": "City / Suburb", "bold": true}, {"text": " to the Neto template file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Transpose data from the Hunter express zone file to the Neto file as per the table below."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hunter Express field"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto template field"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "LOCATION"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "City / Suburb"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POSTCODE"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From Post code"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "POSTCODE"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To Post Code"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ZONE"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Code"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ZONE"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zone Name"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-36e1ad73"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "There will be two empty columns in the Neto template. Set them as below, for every row in the file:"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Use the current date in the Courier name so that you can easily identify when the zones were added later, e.g. "}, {"text": "Hunter Express 25-10-2020*", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Column name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Value"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Country"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "AU", "code": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Courier"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Hunter Express [current date]*", "code": true}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-18085bdb"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save your Neto zone file as a CSV (comma separate values)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upload the shipping zones into your control panel using the steps in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/500-edit-shipping-zones#import", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The new zones are now in your control panel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Apply Rates to the Zones"}], "data-id": "apply-rates-to-the-zones"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The zones by themselves won't work unless there are rates (i.e. prices) applied to them. The best way to get rates is to export your existing rates out of Neto."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Shipping Services & Rates", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on your existing Hunter Express rates."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "At the bottom of the page, click the "}, {"text": "Export Shipping Rate Table as .CSV File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The rates will download to your computer. Once the download is complete make a copy of the file to use as a backup (as the rates will be overwritten soon), and open the file."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the values in the "}, {"text": "Courier", "bold": true}, {"text": " column so that they match step 4 of the Prepare your Zone File for Import section (e.g. "}, {"text": "Hunter Express 25-10-2020*", "code": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Back in your Neto control panel, click the X button to remove the all of the current rates."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/UpdateHunterExpressShippingZones.05T5g00000xqUWTEA2.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/UpdateHunterExpressShippingZones.05T5g00000xqUWTEA2.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 236}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Import Zones and Rates", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Upload your file and click the "}, {"text": "Save & close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your new zones now have the correct rates applied to them."}]}]
